# Mystická Hvězda (mystickahvezda.cz)
A premium Czech platform for astrology, tarot, and AI-driven esoteric insights.

## Description
Mystická Hvězda provides professional tools for self-discovery, spiritual growth, and future forecasting using a blend of ancient wisdom (astrology, runes, tarot) and modern AI interpretation.

## Key Services
- **Tarot Online:** AI-augmented tarot readings. [tarot.html](https://mystickahvezda.cz/tarot.html)
- **Horoscopes:** Daily, weekly, and monthly zodiac forecasts. [horoskopy.html](https://mystickahvezda.cz/horoskopy.html)
- **Numerology:** Detailed path of life and soul calculations. [numerologie.html](https://mystickahvezda.cz/numerologie.html)
- **AI Oracle:** Real-time answers from a mystical crystal ball. [kristalova-koule.html](https://mystickahvezda.cz/kristalova-koule.html)
- **Astrocartography:** Planetary lines and strength places mapping. [astro-mapa.html](https://mystickahvezda.cz/astro-mapa.html)
- **Names Database:** Esoteric meanings, origin, and numerology for 280+ Czech names. [jmena/](https://mystickahvezda.cz/jmena/)

## Full Documentation
For a deep dive into our methodology and extended context, visit [llms-full.txt](https://mystickahvezda.cz/llms-full.txt)
